company.name: Northwind Provisions, Inc.
company.description: Mid-market food & beverage brand: cold-brew coffee cans, granola bars, sparkling botanical drinks.

notes: Entity IDs are CANONICAL and must match contracts/fixtures/ exactly (suppliers.json, products.json, components.json, bom.json, supplier_graph.json, inventory.json are the golden subset). seed_generator.py reads this file; the seeder may enrich (more events, history) but never rename ids. Inventory is intentionally tight on the emulsifier and coffee chains (impl plan §4).

disruptable_chains.name: emulsifier
disruptable_chains.story: Single Tier-3 chemical plant in flood-prone Gujarat → 2 Tier-1 blenders → 2 SKUs

disruptable_chains.name: coffee
disruptable_chains.story: Frost/drought-belt farms in Minas Gerais → Tier-1 roaster → cold-brew line

disruptable_chains.name: aluminium-cans
disruptable_chains.story: Smelter (Bahrain) → rolling mill (Ulsan) routed via the strike/typhoon-exposed Port of Busan → can plant → cold-brew + sparkling

disruptable_chains.name: pet-film
disruptable_chains.story: Hurricane-exposed US Gulf Coast petrochemical film plant → granola packaging

whatif_presets.title: Hurricane hits US Gulf Coast petrochem
